stemHtml: What is one of the functions of communication within a well coordinated team?

options.a: All members of the crew can participate in the decision making process.
options.b: It is easier for a Commander to impose decisions on the other crew members.
options.c: Crew members can make their own decisions and make other members aware of them more easily.
options.d: It is easier to make group decisions that are good but involve more risk.
